prompt_text:
Analyze the following java source code for violations of the Open/Closed Principle (OCP).

Use a TWO-STAGE reasoning process:

## Stage 1 — List design smells (silent, for your own reasoning)
Identify relevant low-level design smells you observe in the code:
- God Class, Feature Envy, Shotgun Surgery, Divergent Change
- Long Method, Large Class, Long Parameter List
- Refused Bequest, Inappropriate Intimacy, Message Chains
- Switch Statements on type, Data Clumps
Think through these internally. D...
raw_response:
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser._getText2",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 293,
      "line_end": 309,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on JsonToken ID requires modification to support new token types.",
      "reasoning": "The switch statement directly checks token IDs. If a new JsonToken type is added, this method must be modified to handle it, violating the Open/Closed Principle."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.getStringCharacters",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 311,
      "line_end": 331,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on JsonToken ID requires modification to support new token types.",
      "reasoning": "The switch statement on `_currToken.id()` necessitates changes to existing code whenever new token types are introduced in the Jackson framework."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.getStringLength",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 333,
      "line_end": 353,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on JsonToken ID requires modification to support new token types.",
      "reasoning": "This method uses a switch-case block to determine behavior based on token ID, which is a classic OCP violation as it is not extensible for new token types."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.getStringOffset",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 355,
      "line_end": 372,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on JsonToken ID requires modification to support new token types.",
      "reasoning": "Similar to other methods in this class, this switch-case logic is closed to extension and requires modification for new token types."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.nextToken",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 479,
      "line_end": 546,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on character code for token parsing requires modification for new tokens.",
      "reasoning": "The switch-case logic based on the character `i` to identify the next token is a hard-coded parser logic that must be modified to support any new JSON token or value type."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser._nextTokenNotInObject",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 548,
      "line_end": 586,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on character code requires modification for new tokens.",
      "reasoning": "This method manually parses tokens based on character inputs, which is tightly coupled to the existing set of JSON tokens and must be modified to support extensions."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.nextName",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 651,
      "line_end": 718,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on character code for token parsing requires modification.",
      "reasoning": "The method logic contains a large switch-case structure for identifying the next token, which is not extensible."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.nextNameMatch",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 820,
      "line_end": 883,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on character code for token parsing requires modification.",
      "reasoning": "This method relies on a hard-coded switch statement to distinguish token types, making it impossible to extend without modifying the source code."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser._isNextTokenNameYes",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 912,
      "line_end": 963,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on character code for token parsing requires modification.",
      "reasoning": "The token identification logic is embedded in a switch statement that is closed to extension."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser._isNextTokenNameMaybe",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 965,
      "line_end": 1022,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on character code for token parsing requires modification.",
      "reasoning": "Token parsing is implemented via a switch statement, violating OCP because adding new token types requires modifying this specific method."
    }
  ]
}
